title: カレン的SNSとの付き合い方♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"At lunch with City. ♪ #BeautifulCity #and
#CuteCurrenChan"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And there's my post. ♪ I'm sure it'll get a ton of
likes. ☆

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Geez, Curren. You're too good at getting people
to do whatever you want. Before I knew it, we
were already at lunch taking a pic together.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But I just wanted to spend time with you. Did you
not wanna spend time with me?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sigh... There you go again.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! You've already got 50,000 likes?! That's
insane.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're looking at it? There's a bunch of
comments too. It's all thanks to you, City. ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You're not kidding. The comments keep on
coming... "Cute." "Pretty." "Two beauties..."

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What the—?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: What's up?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Ah, it's nothing...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: No, really! What is it?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"Normies shouldn't get involved with City."
"Nobodies should know their place." ...Oh my.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh, here come the hate comments... I figured
there'd be a few, haha.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But they're using my name to put you down.
That's so not the vibe. I better put a stop to this!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: It's okay. I don't let things like this get to me...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh... But now that I think about it, I've noticed
juuust a tad more hate comments since I started
at Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Wait, seriously?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I've gotten more followers too, but the comments
aren't really a safe space anymore... Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Big Bro. How would you handle it?
choice_data_list: I'd show them the light with your cuteness.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Big Sis. How would you handle it?
choice_data_list: I'd show them the light with your cuteness.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Yeah, you're right. That's what I'd do too.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? What do you mean? I don't get it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. It just means my bond with Big Bro is
just that special. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. It just means my bond with Big Sis is
just that special. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Aaanyway! I wanna ask for your help too, City! ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Uh, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: City! You're here! Thanks for yesterday! ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...I was just looking at your Umastagram. I finally
get what you meant by "showing them the light
with your cuteness."

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Haha, you do, huh? Well, it's all thanks to you.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to the whole new way of taking pictures
that you taught me, my comments section has
gotten safer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After their conversation, Curren Chan posted a
picture with new levels of cuteness. When people
saw that her cuteness had reached new heights,
they changed their tune.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
This one says, "She's not a normie—she's an angel!
She's so cute!" What a bunch of perfect
hypocrites.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't put it like that. They just saw the light,
that's all. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad I got more followers too. ♪ Let me know
if you ever need my help with anything, City!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Not just anyone can do this. You really do amaze
me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City stares at Curren Chan with awe in her
eyes, and I know exactly how she feels.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Well, I suppose that is the typical solution...
You're not mad, are you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Well, I suppose that is the typical solution...
You're not mad, are you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even if she says she's fine, I can't just stand by
and let people hurt my trainee. I tell her I think
she should take care of the problem right away.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I agree. Nothing good comes from ignoring stuff
like this.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You should report it to Umastagram. It might
take some time, but I'm sure they'll do something.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thanks, you two. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But I've got a feeling about this, so please just
bear with me for a bit. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad things worked out... but I never expected
you to have your followers handle it for you.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I didn't have them do anything! They just did what
they thought was right! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fans who saw the hate comments fought back
with comments about Curren's cuteness, and the
haters deleted their nasty comments.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I was surprised they ended up following me,
though. It's all thanks my fans. ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But there's definitely a fine line. If your fans lash
back at the hate comments, everyone will go
after them too.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: That won't happen.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
After all, anyone who likes me wouldn't do
anything that's not cute! ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...I get it. It sounds like you have a good
relationship with your fans.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I think I'll go check my comments too. Maybe I
should try liking things my followers post
sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Big Bro? You don't think I did the right
thing, do you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Big Sis? You don't think I did the right thing,
do you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to worry you, but everything worked out,
didn't it? Besides...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Seeing you get mad on my behalf was sooo cool.
Thank you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Seeing you get mad on my behalf was sooo cool.
Thank you. ♪
